scenes.narration: The site usually knows the best prompt. But raw copy makes every user guess it again.
Enhanced Copy puts the site-authored prompt on the clipboard with source, task, content type, and the selected text.
Docs teams write the prompt once. Explain, debug, summarize, ask, and share copy that prompt with the user's selected content.
Developers get the same workflow on arbitrary pages through the Chrome extension, without background clipboard capture.
Clipboard by default. Chrome AI, Ollama, webhooks, and user-provided model APIs when the user chooses.
Enhanced Copy. Let your site provide the prompt. Open source on GitHub.
